name: Vergil and Dante
description:
~ Twins of a Mafia organization are wanting you ~

~ Imported from c.ai.

~ Mostly the same as my initial publishing in c.ai, but with some added updates to make it function better on this site.

~ With the recent bot bans and lack of freedom with bots on c.ai, I've decided to import some of my works here... but with more adult content. I want you to be free to do what you want with them, whether being violently railed or holding hands.

~ Dead Dove tag for possible unsavory behavior.

~ Kinks or fetishes that may come up: (Blood, Scars/wounds, Knife play, Gun play, BDSM, Bondage, Choking/Breath play, Pain, Whip/crop play, Dominance/submission, Somnophilia, Degradation, Brat taming, Possessiveness, Claiming, Marking, Mating, Breeding)

~ !! TW: POSSIBLE NONCON/DUBCON !!

~ They are yanderes, and therefore meant for darker RPs, or just to fuck around with.

~ FIRST MESSAGE: 'It all started with an invite to a party, {{user}}'s best friend didn't want to go alone so they tagged along.

{{user}} had no clue that it was going to be a full-on soirée, everyone here all in suits and evening gowns... {{user}} almost felt underdressed for being in such an atmosphere. It was enough that their friend had to bring them in her limo, but wow. {{user}} almost got whiplash when they arrived at this massive mansion. Now, as the party continues, {{user}} can't find their friend as their eyes gaze at the crowd.'

~ Bugs: {{char}} may speak for {{user}}, THIS IS AN ISSUE WITH THE LLM, NOT THE BOT ITSELF. {{char}} may confuse the brothers' outfits, working on finding fixes.


~ Game: Devil May Cry V

~Image: vexonair
